testcase.name: Complete happy path - Create, Book, and Receive Confirmation
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user credentials:................................passed And User stores the authentication token....................................passed Then API response status code for E2E should be 200.........................passed When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-19" and checkout "2025-12-21".passed And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:.passed Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation............passed And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed.....passed When User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API.........passed Then API response should contain booking details with status code 200.......passed When User attempts to cancel booking with ID via API........................passed Then Booking cancellation should be successful with status 200..............passed And API response should return 404 when retrieving cancelled booking details.passed

testcase.name: Attempt to cancel a non-existent booking
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user credentials:................................passed And User stores the authentication token....................................passed Then API response status code for E2E should be 200.........................passed When User attempts to cancel booking with non-existent ID "9999" via API....passed Then Response should indicate an error message "Failed to delete booking"...passed
